hypothesis: Enhancing selectivity margin by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to improve complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/TM5 interactions, and introducing hydrophobic substitutions at position 11 to reduce off-target (SSTR3/SSTR5) binding.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are generating strong ddG values but lack structural validity. The next iteration should focus on improving structural quality and ensuring valid docking while maintaining selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Increase the number of candidates to improve the chances of generating structurally valid and high-quality designs.
Reduce the allowed clash score to enforce better packing and reduce structural artifacts that lead to low pLDDT and invalid docking.
